content.intro1: If you search for "y2mate", you want a simple and fast way to save YouTube audio or video. This Y2mate downloader focuses on YouTube only, with a clean paste‑and‑download flow that works on iPhone, Android, and desktop browsers. No app. No account.
content.intro2: Choose the quality you need: MP4 at 360p/720p/1080p or MP3 at 128/192/320kbps . There's no file size limit and we provide market‑leading download speed to keep things smooth even for long videos.

instructions.title: How to use the Y2mate downloader
steps: Paste a YouTube link (or enter a keyword) into the box.
Click Start to analyze the video.
Pick MP4 or MP3 quality (e.g., 1080p, 320kbps) and download.

whyChoose.title: Why choose this Y2mate downloader
reasons: Unlimited use and no file size limits.
Fastest download speed in the market.
Works on iPhone, Android, and desktop browsers.

items.title: Unlimited downloads
items.description: Use Y2mate as much as you want. There is no file size limit and no daily cap.

items.title: Simple and reliable
items.description: Paste a YouTube link, click Start, choose quality, and download. The interface stays lightweight and consistent across major browsers.

items.title: Quality you choose
items.description: Pick MP4 at 360p/720p/1080p or MP3 at 128/192/320kbps  to fit your needs. Higher options may appear when available from the source.

items.title: High-Speed Downloads
items.description: Experience industry-leading download speeds for both video and audio. Our optimized infrastructure ensures fast processing whether you're downloading MP3 music or MP4 videos-no lengthy queues or delays.

items.title: 100% Online Tool
items.description: Use Y2mate directly in your web browser without installing any software or extensions. No account registration, no email verification, no personal information required. Just visit, paste, and download.

items.title: Cross-Platform Support
items.description: Y2mate works flawlessly on all operating systems and devices: Windows PCs, Macs, Linux machines, iPhones, iPads, Android smartphones and tablets. Compatible with Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, and Opera browsers.

items.question: What does Y2mate do?
items.answer: Y2mate lets you save YouTube videos and audio directly in your browser. Convert to MP4 (360p/720p/1080p - up to 2K/4K when available) or MP3 (128/192/320kbps). No app, no account.

items.question: Do I have to pay to use Y2mate?
items.answer: No. Y2mate is free to use - no sign‑up, no trial, and no hidden fees.

items.question: Are there limits on downloads or file size?
items.answer: There are no daily caps and no fixed file‑size limit. Very long videos may take longer depending on your connection and device storage.

items.question: Why don't I see 2k/4K on some videos?
items.answer: Available qualities depend on the original upload. If a video was published without certain resolutions or uses separate audio/video streams, some options may not appear.

items.question: How do I save files on iPhone or Android?
items.answer: On iPhone (Safari), choose Download and find files in the Files app; optionally move to Photos. On Android (Chrome), check the Downloads folder or Gallery.

items.question: Does the site store my downloads or links?
items.answer: No. We don't require accounts and don't keep your downloaded files. Basic server logs may be kept for security and reliability.

items.question: Are there limits for file size or length?
items.answer: We don't impose a hard size limit. Extremely long videos may be constrained by your connection or device storage and can take longer to process.

items.question: What should I try if analysis fails?
items.answer: Make sure the YouTube link is valid and public, retry after a moment, and check your connection. Age‑restricted or region‑blocked videos may require additional steps.
